title: hieracium leucophaeum subsp. diabolinum
intro: Hieracium leucophaeum subsp. diabolinum, also known as the Hieracium diabolinum, is a subspecies of plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the world. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium leucophaeum subsp. diabolinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Hieracium leucophaeum subsp. diabolinum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
